Class DatabaseService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.database.DatabaseService
public class DatabaseService extends Object
Core service layer providing database access and migration management. Acts as a singleton provider for the HikariDataSource, JDBI instance, and a shared async executor service used by downstream plugins for non-blocking database operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • DatabaseService

      public DatabaseService()

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static void init(String jdbcUrl, String username, String password, int poolSize, String driverClass)
      Initializes the database connection pool and JDBI instance. Also sets up a fixed thread pool for asynchronous database tasks.
      Parameters:
      jdbcUrl - the JDBC connection string
      username - the database user
      password - the database password
      poolSize - maximum number of connections in the pool
      driverClass - the fully qualified name of the JDBC driver class

    • registerMigrations

      public static void registerMigrations(List<Migration> migrations)
      Registers a list of migrations to be executed. Plugins should call this during their onEnable phase.
      Parameters:
      migrations - the list of migration instances to add to the queue

    • runMigrations

      public static void runMigrations(String pluginName, Logger logger)
      Executes all registered migrations using the MigrationRunner.
      Parameters:
      pluginName - the name of the plugin triggering the migrations (used for logging and tracking)
      logger - the logger instance for reporting progress/errors

    • shutdown

      public static void shutdown()
      Shuts down the connection pool and the async executor service.

    • getDataSource

      public static DataSource getDataSource()
      Returns:
      the HikariDataSource instance

    • getJdbi

      public static org.jdbi.v3.core.Jdbi getJdbi()
      Returns:
      the JDBI instance configured with SqlObject support

    • getExecutor

      public static ExecutorService getExecutor()
      Returns:
      the shared async executor service for database tasks
